touches.ai_summary: Taylor Hoffmann from LunarGrid submitted an inbound demo request expressing interest in improving sales team productivity and automating manual workflows. Initial inquiry mentioned they're currently evaluating solutions.
Follow-up email sent confirming receipt of demo request and proposing times for discovery call. Taylor responded positively and selected a time slot for next week.

questions_asked.question: Can we include our RevOps team in the discovery call?
questions_asked.answer: Absolutely, the more stakeholders we can include early on, the better we can understand your needs.

touches.ai_summary: Sent pre-call questionnaire to understand current tech stack and pain points. Taylor mentioned they have 34 sales reps struggling with manual data entry and forecasting accuracy.

questions_asked.question: What tools are you currently using for sales automation?
questions_asked.answer: Mostly Salesforce and some homegrown scripts, but nothing comprehensive for automation.

touches.ai_summary: Taylor shared that they're also evaluating Clari and want to understand our differentiation, particularly around automation capabilities versus forecasting-only tools.

questions_asked.question: How does your automation compare to Clari's approach?
questions_asked.answer: While Clari focuses primarily on forecasting, we provide unlimited automation workflows that go beyond just pipeline visibility to actually reduce manual work.

touches.ai_summary: Final confirmation email before discovery call. Taylor confirmed attendees and shared that their COO Riley Santos is very interested in seeing ROI metrics from similar professional services companies.
Post-discovery call follow-up thanking Taylor and team for their time. Confirmed key pain points around rep productivity and manual CRM hygiene with 34-person sales team.

Discovery call with Taylor and Riley (RevOps). Discussed current state: reps spending 8+ hours/week on data entry, inconsistent forecasting, and missed follow-ups. Taylor emphasized need for solution within 60 days.

questions_asked.question: What's driving the 60-day timeline?
questions_asked.answer: We're starting Q3 planning and want a solution in place before our next quarterly kickoff.

questions_asked.question: Can your platform integrate with our existing Salesforce instance and custom objects?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we have native Salesforce integration and can map to custom objects during implementation.

touches.ai_summary: Second discovery call focused on use case prioritization. Taylor walked through their ideal state: automated activity capture, smart follow-up reminders, and AI-powered email drafting for their team.

questions_asked.question: Which use case would deliver the most immediate value?
questions_asked.answer: Definitely automated activity capture. Our reps hate logging calls and emails manually.

questions_asked.question: How long does implementation typically take for a team our size?
questions_asked.answer: For 34 seats with standard integrations, typically 2-3 weeks from contract signature to full rollout.

next_steps: Prepare demo focused on activity capture
Loop in Sales Managers for feedback

touches.ai_summary: Email recapping discovery findings and proposing demo agenda. Taylor confirmed and requested that Henry Hernandez (Sales Manager) attend to evaluate technical fit and change management needs.

Technical evaluation call with Henry Hernandez and RevOps. Deep dive into API capabilities, data security, and GDPR compliance for their European clients. Henry asked detailed questions about workflow customization and admin controls.

questions_asked.question: Can we customize automation rules by team or region?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, unlimited automation tier includes role-based rules and geo-specific configurations.

questions_asked.question: What's your data retention policy and do you support GDPR deletion requests?
questions_asked.answer: We retain data per your configuration, support right-to-deletion, and are GDPR and SOC 2 compliant.

questions_asked.question: Who would own admin responsibilities on your side?
questions_asked.answer: Henry would be primary admin with Riley as backup from RevOps.

objections: We need to ensure your SSO integration works with our Okta setup before we can commit.

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email addressing Henry's technical questions with documentation on SSO setup, API rate limits, and security architecture. Taylor confirmed they're moving forward with full demo.
Demo reminder email sent with agenda. Taylor mentioned they're also seeing a Clari demo next week and want to make sure they understand our unique value on automation before that meeting.

questions_asked.question: Can you make sure to show side-by-side what automation looks like versus just forecasting dashboards?
questions_asked.answer: Absolutely, we'll demo real automation workflows that save rep time, not just reporting features.

touches.ai_summary: Product demo with Taylor, Henry, and Amara (Sales Manager). Showcased automated activity capture, smart follow-up workflows, and AI email assistant. Team was impressed with ease of use but asked about pricing structure.

questions_asked.question: How is the unlimited automation tier priced compared to your other packages?
questions_asked.answer: It's our enterprise tier at $1,350 per seat annually, which includes all automation features without workflow limits.

questions_asked.question: What would success look like for your team in the first 90 days?
questions_asked.answer: Reducing manual data entry time by at least 50% and improving forecast accuracy to above 85%.

next_steps: Schedule executive alignment call with COO

touches.ai_summary: Executive meeting with Riley Santos (COO) to discuss strategic fit and business case. Riley focused heavily on ROI metrics, implementation timeline, and total cost of ownership compared to alternatives.

questions_asked.question: What ROI are similar professional services companies seeing in year one?
questions_asked.answer: Average 3-4x ROI from time savings alone, with companies reporting 6-10 hours saved per rep per week.

questions_asked.question: What does your pricing look like for multi-year agreements?
questions_asked.answer: We can offer 10% discount on 2-year contracts and 15% on 3-year commitments.

questions_asked.question: Are there other stakeholders we should involve before moving to proposal?
questions_asked.answer: Riley O'Connor from RevOps will handle procurement and contract review.

objections: We need to see a detailed comparison with Clari before we can make a final decision.
next_steps: Send formal proposal to Riley O'Connor

touches.ai_summary: Sent formal proposal for 34 seats at $45,900 ACV with unlimited automation tier. Included ROI calculator, implementation timeline, and competitive differentiation document addressing Clari comparison.
Follow-up email checking in on proposal review. Taylor mentioned they had their Clari demo and are now in internal discussions. She indicated pricing is a bit higher than expected but value is clear.

questions_asked.question: Is there any flexibility on the per-seat pricing given our company size?
questions_asked.answer: Let me discuss with leadership and get back to you on volume discount options.

touches.ai_summary: Email confirming we can offer 5% discount for 34 seats, bringing ACV to $45,800. Taylor appreciated the flexibility and said they're moving into final negotiations with procurement team.
next_steps: Schedule negotiation call with Riley O'Connor

touches.ai_summary: Executive negotiation meeting with Riley Santos and Riley O'Connor (procurement). Discussed contract terms, payment schedule, and service level agreements. Procurement requested net-60 payment terms and quarterly invoicing.

questions_asked.question: Can you accommodate net-60 payment terms instead of net-30?
questions_asked.answer: We can do net-45 as a middle ground for enterprise accounts.

questions_asked.question: What are your standard SLAs for support response times?
questions_asked.answer: Enterprise tier includes 4-hour response time for critical issues and dedicated CSM.

objections: Our legal team will need to review your data processing addendum and may request modifications.

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up executive meeting to review legal feedback on DPA. Riley Santos confirmed they're comfortable with our standard terms with minor language adjustments. Discussed implementation kickoff timeline.

questions_asked.question: What's your ideal start date for implementation?
questions_asked.answer: We'd like to start within 2 weeks of signature to meet our Q3 kickoff deadline.

questions_asked.question: Will you provide dedicated onboarding support for our team?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, enterprise tier includes dedicated implementation manager and custom training sessions.

touches.ai_summary: Email confirming final contract terms: 34 seats, $45,800 ACV, net-45 payment, quarterly invoicing, and minor DPA amendments. Sent to Riley O'Connor for final procurement approval and signature routing.
Negotiation call with Taylor to finalize last-minute questions from their finance team about invoice formatting and PO requirements. Confirmed all procurement requirements met.

questions_asked.question: Can you include our PO number on invoices and send to AP directly?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we'll configure billing to include PO number and route to your AP email.

touches.ai_summary: Final negotiation call with Taylor and Riley O'Connor confirming contract is routed for signature. Discussed onboarding kickoff schedule and assigned implementation manager. Contract expected to be signed within 48 hours.

questions_asked.question: Who should our implementation manager coordinate with for kickoff?
questions_asked.answer: Henry Hernandez will be primary point of contact, with Amara as backup for user training.

questions_asked.question: What's the latest we can start implementation and still hit our Q3 kickoff?
questions_asked.answer: If we sign by end of week, we can complete implementation by your target date with 1 week buffer.
